Bash("C:/Users/User/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python310/python.exe" -c "
import PyPDF2
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
pdf = PyPDF2.PdfReader\(''C:/Users/User/Documents/first_year_files/folder_for_jobs/UAV/docs/PLM_Thesis_UAV_Flood_Assessment_REVISED.pdf''\)

# Check multiple pages for comprehensive review
pages_to_check = [
    \(29, ''Methodology - Dataset section''\),
    \(30, ''Dataset continuation''\),
    \(35, ''Model Architecture''\),
    \(40, ''Training Strategy''\),
    \(45, ''Loss Function''\),
    \(50, ''Results''\),
    \(55, ''Safety Classifier''\),
    \(60, ''Domain Shift''\),
]

for page_num, desc in pages_to_check:
    if page_num - 1 < len\(pdf.pages\):
        print\(f''\\n=== PAGE {page_num} \({desc}\) ===''\)
        text = pdf.pages[page_num - 1].extract_text\(\)
        print\(text[:2000]\)
        print\(''...''\)
")
